tool_args.content:
# Backup existing files
Backup-File -Path brain_server.py
# Apply the patch
Apply-Patch -Path patches\brain_episode_v1.diff
# Compile python file
py_compile brain_server.py
# Run smoke tests
Run-SmokeTests
